modes.intent: Balanced default for general-purpose SaaS used by mixed audiences on desktops and laptops with occasional touch.

responsive_transformations: Below 768px viewport width, promote comfortable to touch so the layout is finger-friendly on phones and small tablets.
On a detected coarse-pointer device, raise interactive targets to the 44px touch minimum even while keeping comfortable spacing.
Multi-column tables collapse to stacked cards under 640px to preserve readable row content.
At high zoom or large base font, spacing scales with rem so density degrades gracefully rather than clipping.
notes: This is the recommended global default when the audience and device mix are unknown.
Comfortable already clears the 40px target guideline for pointers; the touch mode exists for fingers specifically.
Pairs naturally with the saas-balanced motion grammar.
Keep the density toggle available so power users can drop to compact on demand.
